features: Enhanced Cleanliness for Everyday Freshness: Experience a superior clean with Andrex Ultimate Fresh Washlets, designed to complement dry toilet tissue for a fresher, more hygienic routine.
Dermatologically Tested and Gentle: Formulated to be gentle on skin, these washlets are safe for daily use, giving you a soothing and comfortable experience.
Biodegradable and Flushable: Andrex Washlets are responsibly crafted to break down after flushing.
Lightly Fragranced for Added Freshness: Enjoy the uplifting scent that leaves you feeling refreshed and confident after every use
Bulk Pack: With 12 packs x 36 wipes included, you'll have a reliable supply that caters to the whole family.
description: Product Description Andrex Classic Clean Washlets Moist Toilet Tissue are a uniquely designed, lightly moistened toilet tissue with micellar water and cotton fresh fragrance. In addition, they are NOW in a recycle-ready pack, which will save 121 tonnes of plastic from going into landfill every year. Use alongside your regular Andrex toilet tissue to leave you feeling cleaner and fresher. Store a pack of Andrex Washlets by your toilet for a fresh feeling every time you use the loo. Feel clean and confident to tackle the day with micellar water infused washlet flushable toilet wipes. Bulk buy wipes in packs of 12 so you can place them around the house, or even in your handbag - they can double up as wet wipes too. Ingredients Aqua,Phenoxyethanol,Propylene Glycol,Sodium Citrate,Sodium Benzoate,Benzoic Acid,Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate,Dehydroacetic Acid,Parfum,Tocopheryl Acetate,Citric Acid Directions Use as flushable wet wipes alongside regular toilet paper.
